company.name: Pfizer Inc.
company.subtitle: $62.6B 2025 | Eliquis 2026 + Ibrance 2027 + Vyndaqel 2028 LOE wave | Seagen ADCs offset | Obesity pivot post-danuglipron
company.cashRunway: Operating $10B+/yr; net debt ~$60B post-Seagen constrains M&A

market.notes: BNT mRNA COVID vaccine partnered with BioNTech (50/50 profit-share ex-GREATER CHINA). 2025 ~$5.3B (-35% YoY normalization). Annual booster ACIP-recommended >=65 + at-risk. ~25M US doses 2024-25 season.

us.reachPct.note: Comirnaty ~12% reach -- ~25M US doses / ~210M adult eligible (BNT 50% share + Moderna 50%).

us.priceK.note: $130/dose blended -- commercial $130, Medicare Part B, Bridge Access free uninsured.

market.notes: Oral 3CL protease inhibitor for symptomatic high-risk COVID. 2025 ~$0.8B (-70% YoY). Paxlovid+ ritonavir 5-day course. US WAC ~$1390/course post-USG transition.

us.reachPct.note: Paxlovid ~6% reach of ~5M annual high-risk COVID Rx-eligible.

assets.name: Eliquis (apixaban, Factor Xa) — w/ BMS profit-share

market.notes: Direct Factor Xa inhibitor; AF stroke prevention + VTE treatment + prevention. BMS books global commercial; PFE 50/50 profit-share. ~$6.49B PFE 2025 (~10% of total). US composition LOE late 2026 (generic apixaban approved Nov 2024). Medicare IRA-negotiated price $295/30-day starting 2026 — material erosion.

us.reachPct.note: Eliquis ~14% of US AF/VTE thrombosis pool (BMS+PFE combined ~50% NOAC class share, PFE 50% profit-share).

us.wtpPct.note: 70% -- Medicare Part D + commercial broad coverage; PA standard.

market.notes: First-in-class TTR stabilizer for ATTR-CM (wild-type + hereditary). Approved 2019. Major growth driver post-2020. ~$4.4B 2025 (+~15%). US composition LOE end 2028 (PTE-extended). Litigation strategy + life-cycle management ongoing. Class competition: BridgeBio acoramidis (Attruby, late 2024 launch) + Alnylam vutrisiran (Amvuttra ATTR-CM label exp 2025) + AZ eplontersen.

us.reachPct.note: Vyndaqel ~30% of US ATTR-CM diagnosed pool (~70K US treated); first-mover dominance pre-acoramidis.

us.wtpPct.note: 80% -- specialty pharmacy; Medicare Part D + commercial broad coverage.

market.notes: PCV13 (Prevnar 13) peds + adult + PCV20 (Prevnar 20) adult>=18 expansion. 2025 ~$6.4B (~10% revenue). PCV13 composition LOE 2026 -- but PCV20 protected. Class peer: Merck Vaxneuvance (15v) + Capvaxive (21v).

us.reachPct.note: Prevnar ~50% of US adult pneumococcal market (Merck 30%); peds nearly universal Prevnar 13/20.

market.notes: First-in-class CDK4/6 inhibitor approved 2015. ~$2.36B 2025 (declining). US composition LOE Mar 2027 (PTE-extended). Class competition: Kisqali (Novartis ribociclib, taking share post-NATALEE) + Verzenio (Lilly abemaciclib, monarchE adjuvant). Generic palbociclib launches 2027+.

us.reachPct.note: Ibrance ~12% of HR+/HER2- breast pool (declining vs Kisqali, Verzenio adjuvant share).

assets.name: Xtandi (enzalutamide, AR antagonist) — w/ Astellas alliance

market.notes: Second-gen androgen receptor inhibitor. Approved 2012. Astellas alliance 50/50. PFE alliance revenue ~$2.3B 2025. US LOE 2027. Class peers: Erleada (J&J), Nubeqa (Bayer/Orion).

us.reachPct.note: Xtandi ~22% of US prostate cancer pool (alliance share with Astellas).

market.notes: Nectin-4 ADC with MMAE payload. EV-302 1L mUC + Keytruda combo became standard 2024 (HR 0.47 OS). Peak forecast $3-5B with EU expansion + earlier-line use.

us.reachPct.note: Padcev ~15% of US bladder pool (1L mUC + 2L+ post-CPI).

market.notes: Third-gen ALK TKI. CROWN 1L vs crizotinib showed superior PFS + brain efficacy. ~$1.05B 2025 (+38% structural growth in 1L). Competition: Alecensa (Roche alectinib), brigatinib (Takeda), NUVL zidesamtinib pipeline.

us.reachPct.note: Lorbrena ~35% reach of US ALK+ NSCLC pool (~3K addressable); CROWN drives 1L share gain.

market.notes: CD30 ADC with MMAE payload. cHL + ALCL + PTCL. ~$900M 2025 (declining ~12% post Hodgkin BV+AVD adoption peak). US LOE 2026.

us.reachPct.note: Adcetris ~6% of US NHL pool -- CD30+ subset (Hodgkin + ALCL + PTCL) ~15% of NHL; declining post BV+AVD peak.

market.notes: BRAF V600 + MEK combo. Melanoma legacy. ~$350M 2025 portion (declining as IO replaces).

us.reachPct.note: Braftovi+Mektovi ~8% melanoma BRAF+ pool.

market.notes: BREAKWATER 1L BRAF+ mCRC + Erbitux + chemo combo positive 2024-25. Growing fast. ~$350M 2025 portion.

us.reachPct.note: Braftovi BRAF+ mCRC ~4% reach (BRAF V600+ ~7-10% of CRC); BREAKWATER drives growth.

market.notes: First oral JAK approved 2012. RA + UC + PsA + JIA. ~$1.3B 2025 (-8%). Core market LOE 2026 -- generic tofacitinib launches 2026-27.

us.reachPct.note: Xeljanz ~4% of RA + UC + PsA combined branded biologic pool; declining.

market.notes: Selective JAK1 oral for moderate-severe AD. Approved 2022. ~$300M 2025 (+23%). Class peer: Rinvoq (AbbVie upadacitinib) AD. Dupixent dominant overall.

us.reachPct.note: Cibinqo ~3% of moderate-severe AD biologic-eligible pool.

market.notes: First-in-class JAK3/TEC oral for severe alopecia areata. Approved 2023. ~$200M 2025. Class peer: Olumiant (Lilly baricitinib AA approved 2022).

us.reachPct.note: Litfulo ~8% of severe AA branded pool (~150K US severe).

market.notes: Bivalent prefusion-F vaccine. Approved adult>=60 May 2023; maternal Aug 2023. ~$800M 2025. Class competition: Arexvy (GSK ~$1.5B), mResvia (Moderna).

us.reachPct.note: Abrysvo ~8% of US >=60 adult RSV vaccinated (Arexvy GSK 60% share, Moderna entrant).

us.wtpPct.note: 50% -- Medicare Part B + commercial; ACIP narrowed Aug 2024.

market.notes: Oral CGRP receptor antagonist (gepant). Acute + prophylactic dual indication. ~$1.5B 2025 (+30%). Class peer: Ubrelvy (AbbVie ubrogepant), Qulipta (AbbVie atogepant prevention).

us.reachPct.note: Nurtec ~6% of US migraine Rx pool (~38M migraine, ~13M Rx); growing.

market.notes: Anti-TFPI mAb subq weekly. Approved Oct 2024 hem A/B prophylaxis (no inhibitors). Ph3 BASIS positive. Compete with Hemlibra + Mim8 (Novo). Inhibitor ITI Ph3 ongoing.

us.reachPct.note: Marstacimab ~4% of US hemophilia A/B pool by 2030 peak; Hemlibra incumbent dominant.

market.notes: PARP inhibitor + Xtandi combo for HRR+ mCRPC. TALAPRO-2 positive. ~$200M 2025 (+47%). Niche but growing.

us.reachPct.note: Talzenna+Xtandi ~3% HRR-mutated mCRPC reach.

market.notes: Selective S1P1/4/5 modulator approved Oct 2023. ~$150M 2025 ramp. Class peer: Zeposia (BMS ozanimod). UC + future Crohn's expansion.

us.reachPct.note: Velsipity ~2% UC biologic-eligible pool by peak.

indications.name: Sulperazon + Bicillin + Premarin + Brufen + Pristiq + Norvasc + Zoloft generic + others

market.notes: Heritage portfolio of off-patent + sterile injectable + LOE'd brands. Mature, slowly declining ~$5B 2025. Includes Sulperazon (cefoperazone-sulbactam, China dominant), Bicillin (penicillin G benzathine), Premarin (estrogen HRT), Brufen (ibuprofen), Pristiq (desvenlafaxine), Norvasc (amlodipine generic), and many others.
Subcutaneous PD-1 antibody + BCG combo for BCG-naive high-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer. CREST Ph3 positive. EU registration. Niche first-to-market opportunity ~80K US NMIBC.

us.reachPct.note: Sasanlimab ~4% reach US NMIBC if approved 2027+.

assets.name: Vepdegestrant (ARV-471, PROTAC ER degrader, Arvinas partner)

market.notes: First-in-class oral PROTAC estrogen receptor degrader. Arvinas 50/50 collaboration. VERITAC-2 differentiated only in ESR1-mutant subset (~30% post-AI). Pfizer evaluating commercial path; Arvinas may take some indications.

us.reachPct.note: Vepdegestrant ~3% peak reach in ESR1-mutant subset post-CDK4/6 progression (50% PFE share).

market.notes: Integrin β6-targeting ADC with MMAE payload. Be6A LUNG-02 1L mNSCLC TPS>=50%. Differentiation vs HER2-DXd, Datopotamab. Major potential franchise asset $3-5B peak.

us.reachPct.note: Sigvotatug ~6% peak NSCLC; depends on Ph3 confirmatory.

mega_bear.narrative: Full LOE wave hits unmitigated + obesity gap + Seagen ADCs underperform + debt servicing pressure
events: X Eliquis Q4 2026 generic launch -- 50% Y1 erosion
X Ibrance Mar 2027 generic + Kisqali/Verzenio share war = -60% by 2028
X Vyndaqel acoramidis (BridgeBio) takes 40% share pre-LOE 2028
X No obesity in-license materializes
X Sigvotatug Ph3 NSCLC fails or borderline
X Cost-cuts not enough; debt-driven dividend cut
-> Stock to $18-20 (cash + heritage floor minus debt overhang)

bear.narrative: Heavy LOE erosion + slow ADC ramp + obesity BD eventually
events: ~ Eliquis -45% Y1 then stabilizes at 30% generic share
~ Ibrance steep decline; Kisqali takes most lost share
~ Vyndaqel acoramidis takes 25-30% share pre-LOE
~ Padcev + Lorbrena grow but offset partial
~ Sigvotatug Ph3 OK; sasanlimab approved EU
~ Obesity BD deal closes 2027

base.narrative: LOE wave manageable + Seagen ADCs deliver + obesity BD + cost cuts on track
events: V Eliquis generic erosion partially offset by Vyndaqel growth
V Padcev $3B+ peak; sigvotatug Ph3 NSCLC positive
V Sasanlimab approved + niche launch
V Vepdegestrant ESR1-mutant approved 2027
V Obesity in-license materializes 2026-27
V $7.2B cost-savings program delivers EPS

bull.narrative: Seagen ADCs ramp $5B+ + obesity BD wins + Vyndaqel litigation extends + cost cuts deliver
events: V Sigvotatug + Padcev + future ADCs combined $5B+ peak
V Obesity BD acquisition delivers $3-5B asset
V Vyndaqel litigation extends to 2030+
V Cost-savings exceed $7.2B target
V Sasanlimab + vepdegestrant + multi-indication wins

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Transformative obesity M&A + ADC platform leadership + Vyndaqel litigation + multi-indication ADC wins
events: V Major obesity acquisition closes — Pfizer regains GLP-1 game
V Seagen ADC franchise reaches $10B+ with 5+ indications
V Vyndaqel litigation + next-gen extends franchise to 2032+
V Multi-PROTAC platform from Arvinas expansion
V Acquisition / strategic alternatives realize sum-of-parts

lastData.title: FY2025 $62.6B (-2% op); 2026 guide $59.5-62.5B; 2026-28 LOE wave looms
points: Seagen integration first full year complete
Cost-savings program raised to $7.2B by end 2027
Danuglipron discontinued Apr 14, 2025 (DILI signal); obesity pivot

nextCatalyst.title: Sasanlimab EU registration + Q1 2026 earnings + obesity BD watch
thresholds: 2026: Vepdegestrant Ph3 ER+ breast registration prep
Q4 2026: Eliquis US LOE event (single largest negative catalyst)
2027-28: Vyndaqel litigation outcomes / next-gen TTR strategy
End 2028: Vyndaqel US LOE -- THE big event

risks: Concentrated 2026-28 LOE wave: Eliquis (Q4 2026), Ibrance (Mar 2027), Xtandi (2027), Vyndaqel (end 2028) = ~$15B+ revenue at risk
Vyndaqel acoramidis (BridgeBio Attruby) competition + Alnylam vutrisiran ATTR-CM label expansion erode pre-LOE
Net debt ~$60B post-Seagen $43B deal limits transformative M&A; obesity in-license likely $5-10B max
Danuglipron discontinuation Apr 2025 left obesity gap vs LLY/NOVO duopoly; lotiglipron also discontinued; Pfizer behind in oral GLP-1 race
Comirnaty / Paxlovid normalization continues; not a growth driver
Seagen integration mixed: Padcev outperforms but Adcetris/Tukysa underperform (Tukysa $820M intangible impairment Q4 2025)
Cost-savings program execution risk + margin pressure from IRA negotiation (Eliquis 2026, Vyndaqel TBD)
Activist scrutiny on capital allocation post-Seagen; potential strategic alternatives
Eliquis is BMS profit-share so net contribution lower than gross; modeled at PFE share

catalysts.title: Sasanlimab EMA registration decision (BCG-naive NMIBC)
catalysts._rationale: EU registration phase per Pfizer Feb 2026 pipeline; CREST Ph3 positive.

catalysts.title: Eliquis US generic launch — composition LOE
catalysts._rationale: Generic apixaban approved Nov 2024; US composition LOE late 2026. Single largest negative catalyst.

catalysts.title: Sigvotatug vedotin Ph3 Be6A LUNG-02 readout (1L mNSCLC)
catalysts._rationale: Be6A LUNG-02 Ph3 enrolling per Pfizer Feb 2026 pipeline; readout 2027+.

catalysts.title: Vepdegestrant ER+ breast registration / commercial path
catalysts._rationale: VERITAC-2 differentiated in ESR1-mutant subset; Pfizer/Arvinas commercial path TBD.

catalysts.title: Vyndaqel US LOE — composition expiry (THE big one)
catalysts._rationale: PTE-extended LOE end 2028; litigation strategy + next-gen TTR may extend.
